title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: WOODBURN TEEN CENTER BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 400 S Settlemeier Avenue Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Grades 6-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 980-2428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 980-2428 Main phone Main phone (503) 980-2428 Woodburn Branch Director Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 annual membership fee, plus $30 monthly fee, additional fees for summer camps DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
